title: sanguisorba sanguisorba var. stenolopha
intro: Sanguisorba sanguisorba var. stenolopha, also known as Great Burnet, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anticoagulant effects. The health benefits of Sanguisorba sanguisorba var. stenolopha include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce bleeding, and alleviate symptoms of menorrhagia and gastrointestinal issues. Sanguisorba sanguisorba var. stenolopha can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
